title: Vision Transformers, on Real Photos
tagline: Patches, positions, self-attention, and multi-layer rollout — all computed over real pretrained features
summary: A pretrained MobileNet runs live in your browser to turn every patch of your photo into a real 1024-dim feature vector. We then compute honest dot-product attention between those real features — not hand-crafted scalars — and paint the result as an overlay. New: a residual-aware multi-layer attention rollout (Abnar & Zuidema 2020) that composes synthetic ViT layers and shows how the receptive field grows with depth.
highlights: Runs real pretrained MobileNet v2 in-browser via TensorFlow.js to extract 1024-dim feature vectors per patch.
Computes real dot-product softmax attention between those real features — no toy scalars anywhere.
Upload any JPEG/PNG or pick a stock photo; patches, vectors, and attention all recompute.
Toggle position embeddings, change the patch size, click any patch and see its real attention heatmap.
Step through a synthesised L-layer stack and watch the residual-aware attention rollout grow the receptive field with depth.
